name: Beef Stew with Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Boneless Chuck or Beef Stew Meat
2 small Zucchinis or other Squash, cut into 1-1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over medium heat, thoroughly brown the meat in the oil. Sprinkle half the salt and pepper over the meat. Lift the meat into a bowl.
2. Saute the onion in the skillet until transparent and lift out into the crockpot.
3. Swirl the water in the skillet, scraping up the juices, then turn the liquid into the crockpot. Add the marjoram, green pepper, bay leaf, celery, potatoes, and zucchini.
4. Sprinkle the remaining salt and pepper over the contents. Place the meat on top and cook on low for 8 to 10 hours.
5. Before serving, remove the meat and vegetables to a platter and keep warm. Skim 2 tbsp fat from the liquid in the crockpot using a spoon.
6. In a skillet, stir the flour with some of the cooking liquid until smooth. Heat rapidly until the sauce thickens, about 5-10 minutes.
7. Simmer the sauce until it is as thick as whipped cream, then pour over the meat and vegetables. Serve in individual bowls or family-style on the warm crockpot.
